description_long: This is a rectangular, red metal toolbox with a textured, slightly weathered surface and visible white scuff marks and scratches, suggesting frequent use. The front features a central silver latch mechanism for securing the lid, and a black, arched handle is mounted on top with metal brackets for carrying. The sides and back are plain except for additional scuff marks and hinge details, while the top surface shows more pronounced wear. The box appears sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for storing and transporting hand tools. Its size and design are typical for portable toolboxes found in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A red, rectangular metal toolbox with a black handle, silver latch, and visible scuff marks, showing signs of heavy use. The surface is textured and weathered, with practical features for carrying and securing tools.
description_view_0: Front view showing the silver latch, black handle, and prominent white scuff marks on the red surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the handle's attachment and a large white scuff mark near the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hinges and additional white scratches, with no latch or handle visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the handle's attachment and more white scuff marks, similar to the left side.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding handle, arched, made of black plastic or rubber with metal brackets; ergonomic grip implied by shape.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Central front clasp latch made of silver metal, standard flip-up design, no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no trays, drawers, or dividers visible from exterior.
